calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-17-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Warner Berry for Thomas A. Larsen, Executor (via CourtCall).

The Court noted the absence of Objector, David Larsen. Mr. Berry explained that David Larson has been inconsistent in participation and explained that the estate assets pour over into a related estate proceeding in El Dorado County, where both brothers are equal beneficiaries.

The Court indicated that it had reviewed the filings and found Mr. Berry's response to the objection helpful and persuasive. The Court overruled David Larsen's objections to the petition for final distribution and took the matter under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Dec-02-2024 Continued To Jan-13-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Warner Bott Berry for Thomas A. Larsen, Executor.

Mr. Berry reported significant progress toward filing a petition for final distribution and closing the estate. Mr. Berry stated that no formal accounting will be required, but a report and petition for closing are still pending.

Counsel requested additional time for filing the petition. The court continued the status on close of estate hearing to January 13, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

Off Calendar Sep-23-2024 Continued To Dec-02-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Warner Berry appeared via court call for Thomas Larsen (petitioner).
Jonathan Nightingale appeared via zoom for and with David Larsen.

Mr. Berry requests a continuance to file the final distribution and that the Sonoma matters are concluded. Matter is continued to December 2, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Wong. Not reported.

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-03-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Warner Berry appeared in person for Thomas Larsen (petitioner).


Mr. Berry stated that he is working on getting a waiver of accounting from his client's brother and will need additional time. Second report on status administration and petition for its approval is taken under submission.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Singh: Not reported.

Off Calendar Oct-09-2023 Continued To Dec-20-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Warner Berry appeared in person for Thomas Larsen (petitioner).

Discussion was held regarding the property located in Healdsburg is worth a lot of money, that the Sonoma County estate is still open, and that Mr. Berry is running into issues with the title company trying to line things up. Status on close of estate is continued to December 20, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Napata: Not reported.

Petition For Order Approving Payment Of Creditors Claim Of Personal Representative And For Reimbursement Of Costs Advanced To The Estate
Off Calendar Aug-24-2022 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-13-2022 Continued To Aug-24-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Warner Berry, in court, for Thomas Larsen, Executor.

The court points to the issue of whether a copy of the amended creditor claim has been served on all residuary beneficiaries as required by Local Rule 14.29(B). Counsel confirms that his client is the only beneficiary and reports of the complex nature of this matter. Counsel advises that he has had issues with File and Serve Express ("FSX") which have prevented him from electronically filing any documents and that he is working with FSX to resolve those issues. The court reminds counsel that only one partial inventory and appraisal ("I&A") has been filed. Counsel reports that he anticipates filing an additional I&A. The court points to the issue of notice which he needs to address. The court reminds counsel that Letters in this matter were issued over one year ago and that the court also expects him to file either a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of status of administration pursuant to probate code 12200.

The matters are continued to Aug-24-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Cecilia Castellanos. Examiner: Sandra Hilton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

Petition For Order Approving Payment Of Creditors Claim Of Personal Representative And For Reimbursement Of Costs Advanced To The Estate

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-13-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. The Court noted that the petition was properly noticed and that there are no objections. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated June 9, 2000 is admitted to probate. Thomas Larsen is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Frank Mahoney is the appointed Probate Referee. Order for the same signed. Status on close of estate is set for July 13, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed one week prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar. If a petition is not filed by then, an appearance will be required.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
